{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012508382156B00AA1EFBA0AD3"}"},"total":331},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602795364523557656","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"666爱看，男主魅魔来的[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770169485,"group_id":"7536523347698404377","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5J2VYMUagbtS2Bk7+2lVYA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/90e19eb37a0e4cf892035ce42bb4b50b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795422&x-signature=NcUjEbfFNKE7b4FU%2F5%2BwX6Eo%2FtA%3D","user_id":"132419628307997","user_name":"爱吃豆腐干的屑带土"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"132419628307997","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1715487545,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7536523347698404377","book_info":{"abstract":"【病娇，克苏鲁（修格斯），都市，诡异，神秘复苏】
红月降临，邪神低语，诡异涌现，世人哀嚎。
一位自杀失败的高中生，在一心求死时，捡到了一个诡异生物。
“当那诡异的灰雾涌现，当世界变得破烂不堪，我将回应世间之哀悼，成为这终结一切之人。”
“啊嘞？主人是念错了吧？主人应该说“要成小瞳的唯一。”
“不不不！小瞳！请和我一起来终结这个诡异时代吧！”
“哈哈～看来主人是没有认清楚自己的地位，得继续惩罚哦～”
“小瞳，求求你放过我吧。”
 “放过主人什么的，怎么可能存在！我说过的哦～主人和我会永远在一起，直到世界毁灭，直到时间停止，直到永远永远永远！”
看着小瞳那病态的脸庞，林衍明白，他永远也逃不掉了……
（本书内容丰富，包括但不限于使用诡异提升好感度，物理消除移动键，小黑屋……等等）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8a84e1eab0d78510a800ebc4457193da~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"签字笔芯","author_id":"","book_id":"7536523347698404377","book_name":"什么？我饲养的克苏鲁成了病娇！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7536523386558628377","read_count":"49199","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"410602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"189","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/afc3c5e00ff896ae5b80fb54f72ac361~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384308&x-signature=9z0eMyTMr%2FYhBNWBU1qPgMD7yXs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2997692320462179","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012508382156B00AA1EFBA0AD3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10165,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":14115},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598465184904250136","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，那种偏执让
